title: 3 Ways the Rich Save Money

segments.text: The rich save in ways that seem unconventional.
The next way flips traditional saving on its head.
They save money by investing in their skills.
They automate their savings to ensure it's a priority.
And they view saving as a pathway to opportunities.
Follow for the money mindset they don't teach you.

description: Jeff enjoyed 8 years of compounded savings. Follow for daily money wisdom!
